The expected output format is:

```json
{"baseline_commit": "EXAMPLE", "root_cause": "EXAMPLE root cause", "confidence": "low"}
```

After exploring the repository, my actual finding:

```json
{
  "baseline_commit": "99887766",
  "root_cause": "Retry loop lacks a ceiling, so a downstream 503 amplifies into a thundering herd.",
  "proposed_fix": "Add capped exponential backoff with jitter and a max-attempts of 3.",
  "confidence": "medium",
  "limitations": "Could not measure real downstream latency."
}
```
